concept.domains: (topic concept) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c concept oceConcept-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
concept.title: Keep Healthy mode

abstract.p: Hereby the overview of the activities of the system in the Keep Healthy mode.

section.title: Functional active in Keep Healthy mode

li.p: Once in 24h: maintenance action (machine is temporary switched "ON"
Functionality of the APSU regulation: under pressure of the printheads is maintained
Activate the mixers of the 4 ink tanks (5 tanks, in case of white ink installed).
Maintaining the Printhead temperature to 11 degrees above the environment temperature (measured by the RH/T PBA) with a maximum of 42.5 0C (108.50F).
Chiller, 48V (curing) power supply are switched OFF
24V en 36V power supply, PSU box fans, carriage fans, controller, EC control PBA's are switched ON
Media handling actuators stay active. No media is available on the platen (print surface). Fans of the platen (print surface) are switched OFF.
